name: Klarify
long_description:
Klarify handles every job a therapist does other than the therapy itself, from clinical notes and treatment plans to insurance claims and finding new clients.

Therapists hold the world together. They also run businesses, file insurance claims, write letters, fill forms, supervise new grads, and do hours of paperwork every night. 

Practice management software has existed for decades. It records what therapists do. It can't actually do any of it.

Klara is the AI at the heart of Klarify. She handles notes, treatment plans, clinical letters, insurance claims, between-session resources, supervision prep, and finding new clients.

Nearly 6,000 therapists use Klarify today.

Our mission is to empower therapists, not replace them. So they can focus on the one thing only a human can do. Be present with their client.
